name: Record: MuonEq-R + Depth Recurrence + N61 Mixed Int5/Int6 GPTQ
blurb: Improves PR #1260 with N_INT6=61 (one more int6 layer). MuonEq-R optimizer, depth recurrence (layers 4,5 shared MLP), 61 int6 + 5 int5 Hessian-ranked GPTQ. 3-seed mean 1.0924 BPB, all under 16MB. No TTT, no SLOT.
author: dexhunter
